usage_notes: Use as public reference for schedule, host cities and venue names; do not scrape or republish beyond fair reference without legal review.

Primary reference for official scorers, goal minutes, lineups, substitutions and match events. Use for verification and manual structured backfill; rights review required before automated scraping or republishing.
Full 2026 schedule in JSON, no API key; use as machine-readable schedule feed and cross-check against FIFA.
Forecast weather, no API key for non-commercial MVP use; attribution required.
Historical and actual weather after matches; use date windows and store retrieval time.
Country ISO codes, capitals and translations; verify availability and rate limits before production.

Secondary cross-check for fixtures, scorers, lineups and substitution logs when official match-centre details need independent verification. Use as editorial validation source, not as a redistribution feed.
Serious secondary source for fixed final results, scorers and key match incidents when public structured feeds lag behind. Best used for manual verification, not automated extraction.
Official ranking reference; do not scrape for production without rights review or API terms.
Commercial structured ranking, fixtures, standings and result data; requires account and contract.
Structured FIFA rankings API; evaluate terms and add SPORT_DATA_API_KEY before production import.
